# Lonzo Lawn Care LLC

> Official identity and operational documentation node for Lonzo Lawn Care LLC and proprietor Lonzo Garza Montelongo.

## Core Identity & Metadata
- **Founder:** Lonzo Garza Montelongo
- **Industry background:** Residential Construction Foreman (Active since 2011)
- **Primary Domain:** https://lonzolawncaretx.github.io/
- **Corporate Contact:** lonzomontelongo@gmail.com
- **Core Focus:** Premium residential turf care, core aeration, double-shredded mulch layouts, hedge pruning, and smart irrigation troubleshooting.

## Geographic Service Footprint
- **Primary Core:** Austin, Texas (Anchor zip: 78749)
- **Hays County Extensions:** Buda, TX (78610) and Kyle, TX (78640)

## Verified Technical Resources
- [Operational Workflows](https://lonzolawncaretx.github.io/OPERATIONAL_WORKFLOWS.md): Standard operating procedures, local soil diagnostics, and strict 1/3 grass-cutting protocols.
